title: The Souler Opposite
review_summary: The reviewer finds "The Souler Opposite" hilarious, heartfelt, and hopeful; praising its original love story themes amidst outstanding performances by Chris Meloni as Barry Singer. They express optimism for further works involving key cast members.

title: Reckless
review_summary: The reviewer enjoyed this lighthearted mini-series about an unconventional romance between younger man Robson Greene (Scott Bakula-like) who is head over heels in love despite the clichés; they suggest it would have been tighter with only two episodes but welcome its release on Netflix.
